userStories.title: Build HMM historic backtest runner script with synthetic-data test
userStories.description: Create scripts/hmm_backtest.py — a CLI that fetches OHLCV via YFinanceFetcher, trains HMMEngine on a warm-up window, and walks forward through the out-of-sample period calling predict_filtered + StrategyOrchestrator.should_enter_position bar-by-bar. Computes a bar-to-bar equity curve (exposure = position_size_pct * leverage, equity *= 1 + exposure * bar_return) and prints Final equity, Total return %, Annualised Sharpe, Max drawdown, Bar count, Regime distribution. Factor the walk-forward loop into an importable pure function `run_walk_forward(df: pd.DataFrame, warmup_pct: float, ...) -> BacktestResult` so pytest can exercise it on synthetic data without network. Add tests/hmm/test_backtest_runner.py that uses the existing sample_ohlcv_data fixture, trains and walks forward on synthetic data, and asserts finite positive equity + no-look-ahead (runner MUST use predict_filtered; monkeypatch HMMEngine.predict to blow up if called). Smoke-run: `uv run python scripts/hmm_backtest.py --ticker SPY --start 2020-01-01 --end 2024-12-31 --interval 1d` must exit 0 and print the summary block.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/hmm_backtest.py exists with argparse CLI exposing --ticker, --start, --end, --interval, --warmup-pct
Script uses HMMEngine.predict_filtered (never model.predict) — look-ahead-bias-free walk-forward
Core logic factored into importable run_walk_forward() returning a BacktestResult with final_equity, total_return_pct, sharpe, max_drawdown, bar_count, regime_distribution fields
tests/hmm/test_backtest_runner.py passes using synthetic sample_ohlcv_data fixture (no network)
Look-ahead regression test: monkeypatches HMMEngine.predict to raise; the runner must still complete without touching it
uv run ruff check scripts tests/hmm exits 0
uv run ruff format --check scripts tests/hmm exits 0
uv run ty check scripts tests/hmm reports no in-scope errors
uv run python -m pytest tests/hmm -q shows all tests passing (54+ tests)

Live smoke run `uv run python scripts/hmm_backtest.py --ticker SPY --start 2020-01-01 --end 2024-12-31 --interval 1d` exits 0 and stdout contains 'Final equity', 'Total return', 'Sharpe', 'Max drawdown', 'Regime distribution'
